title: Follow-up: include skill/ directory in conflict marker guard
close_reason: GitHub issue is closed; reconcile stale open beads task after seed audit pull

title: Background capture process: detach capture from agent lifecycle
description: Closes gh-277. Spawn a detached child process for capture so commandStart returns immediately after writing initial run artifacts. Write a PID/job-metadata file in the run dir. PRD: Goals + MVP Scope + MVP Acceptance.

title: Background capture process
description: The skill must support starting a durable background capture so the agent does not need to remain active. Covers detached child process, PID/job metadata file, and immediate return from start. PRD: Goals, Use Case 1, Start, MVP Scope, MVP Acceptance Criteria.

title: Capture Durability & Backend
description: Capture must outlive the agent invocation. Tracks durable/background capture, PID/job metadata, and backend abstraction work derived from docs/PRD.md (MVP Scope + Acceptance Criteria).

title: Slop: duplicated test polling and CLI helpers
description: Closes gh-338. Extract shared test helpers for CLI spawning and terminal-status polling, then remove unused duplicate polling/sleep helpers from the affected tests.

title: Backend selection should reject unsupported backends or dispatch by backend
description: Closes gh-334. Validate backend selection or route through implemented backend dispatch so unsupported backend names cannot silently run Playwright with wrong metadata or cadence semantics.

title: Render should accept --keep-latest retention flag
description: Closes gh-335. Add render-time --keep-latest parser support and ensure successful render cleanup records latest-frame retention metadata.

title: peek --json should return selected frame metadata
description: Closes gh-333. Expose selected frame metadata in peek --json for latest, index, near, and post-cleanup fallback cases.

title: Slop: unasserted peek result in cleanup samples test
description: Closes gh-325. Decide and assert the expected peek behavior after keep-samples cleanup, or remove the unused command from the cleanup samples test.

title: Slop: empty catch in smoke-test setup
description: Closes gh-324. Replace the empty Playwright setup cleanup catch in the smoke test with an explicit named suppression or recorded cleanup failure path.

title: Slop: async/sync polling helpers in tests
description: Closes gh-322. Extract or standardize shared test polling helpers so repeated setTimeout sleep loops and terminal-status polling behavior do not drift across tests.

title: Cleanup summaries should record bytesFreed for all cleanup paths
description: Closes gh-319. Ensure every render-time and manual cleanup summary records numeric cleanup.bytesFreed, including no-removal cleanup paths.

title: Align frame filename padding between PRD and canonical CLI
description: Closes gh-330. Choose one frame filename padding contract and align docs/PRD.md, frameName(), render input pattern, manifest examples, and tests.

title: Follow-up: Remove duplicate commandStart import in canonical-cli.test.mjs
description: Closes gh-320. Remove the duplicate commandStart import in test/canonical-cli.test.mjs so the canonical CLI test file parses consistently across Node.js environments.
close_reason: GitHub issue #320 is closed; stale open task during backlog grooming

title: Default start viewport should match the PRD desktop default
description: Closes gh-318. Align omitted --viewport behavior with docs/PRD.md User Experience default of 1440x900, or update the PRD if 1280x720 is intentional.

title: Start should accept --url as a documented target input
description: Closes gh-317. Support the PRD-documented timelapse-capture start --url <url> form or reject conflicting positional/--url inputs clearly.

title: Start command interface defaults
description: Start command UX should match the documented PRD interface and defaults. Covers the documented --url target form and desktop web default viewport from docs/PRD.md Proposed Interface and User Experience.

description: Closes gh-311

description: Closes gh-310

title: task
description: Closes gh-310

title: cleanup --frames should record cleanup action in run-summary
description: Closes gh-308. The --frames cleanup branch preserves the run directory and should write run-summary.json cleanup metadata before returning.

title: Start should enforce backend minimum capture interval
description: Closes gh-307. Define and enforce a backend-specific minimum capture interval for direct and video-length-derived start timing.

title: Start timing and cadence controls
description: Start command timing policy must make duration, interval, video-length, FPS, and backend cadence constraints explicit and durable. Covers docs/PRD.md Duration And Interval Calculation.

title: Initial navigation failures should write failed manifest records
description: Closes gh-306. Dogfood Scenario 3 requires initial navigation/backend failures to append a failed manifest.jsonl record with a clear error before any frame loop starts.

title: Render should use persisted FPS from config
description: Closes gh-295. Ensure render <run-dir> uses config.fps unless explicitly overridden, records effective framerate in run-summary.json, and covers non-default persisted FPS with tests.

title: Retained samples should be copied to samples/ before frame cleanup
description: Closes gh-296. Copy representative retained frames into samples/ with stable sample filenames before deleting raw frames, and record retained sample details in run-summary.json.

title: Cleanup summaries should record bytes freed
description: Closes gh-299. Record bytes freed in run-summary.json for render-time and manual cleanup paths, with tests for default cleanup and at least one retention variant.

title: Status output should include attempted and skipped frame counters
description: Closes gh-300. Add attempted and skipped frame counters to status --json and human status output, preserving parity and adding tests for success and failed attempts.

title: Failed initial navigation should leave a diagnostic manifest record
description: Closes gh-298. Initial navigation/backend failures should write a failed manifest record with a clear error so dogfood testers can diagnose bad URL or stopped-server runs.

title: Render should honor persisted cleanup and retention policy
description: Closes gh-297. Honor config.cleanup, keepSamples, and keepLatest persisted by start when render runs without render-time retention flags.

title: Status and manifest diagnostics
description: Status, manifest, and failure diagnostics must make long-running captures understandable for agents and dogfood testers. Covers attempted/skipped counters, failed-attempt records, and status/manifest parity from docs/PRD.md and docs/dogfood-protocol.md.

title: task
description: Closes gh-292

title: Follow-up: Scrutinize error handling in directorySize
description: Closes gh-287. Identified during review of PR #285. In src/timelapse-capture.mjs, the directorySize function handles ENOENT but could be improved to avoid race conditions between readdir and stat if files are being rapidly created/deleted.

title: Render should honor configured FPS from run config
description: Closes gh-282. commandRender should load config.json and pass the persisted fps/framerate into renderFrames so output playback speed matches the start-time configuration. Record the effective framerate in run-summary.json and cover it with tests.

title: Persist render output to render.log
description: Closes gh-281. PRD §Run Directory Structure lists render.log; renderFrames currently uses execFileSync with stdio:pipe and never persists ffmpeg output to disk.

title: Render honors cleanup policy persisted in run config.json
description: Closes gh-280. commandRender does not read config.json/state.cleanup, so start --cleanup never is ignored at render time and frames are deleted. PRD §Frame Retention.

title: Copy retained samples to samples/ directory before deleting frames/
description: Closes gh-279. PRD §Run Directory Structure and §Cleanup safety require a samples/ directory holding retained frames as sample-000001.png. Currently no source code creates samples/.

title: Support --keep-samples N for cleanup and render retention
description: Closes gh-278. Currently --keep-samples is boolean and hardcoded to first+last (src/timelapse-capture.mjs:1661). Accept N as an integer and retain N evenly distributed frames. PRD §Frame Retention.

title: Render observability & log persistence
description: PRD §Run Directory Structure and §Rendering Requirements call for render.log persistence. Currently render output flows through execFileSync without being captured to a file.

title: Sample retention & cleanup policy
description: The retention flags from PRD §Frame Retention are partially implemented. Covers --keep-samples N (currently boolean, hardcoded first+last), samples/ directory creation, and propagating start-time cleanup policy through render.

title: Follow-up: refresh PR #271 description to match implementation
description: Closes gh-275. Refresh PR #271 description so it matches the implemented conflict marker guard changes.

title: render dependency validation (ffmpeg + ffprobe)
description: Closes gh-207. Require ffmpeg + ffprobe for render readiness; refuse render with a clear error when either is missing.

title: validate rendered MP4 before frame cleanup
description: Closes gh-206. Validate the rendered MP4 (nonzero size, positive duration, readable video stream, expected output path) before deleting frames; preserve frames on any failure.

title: Preflight CI workflow
description: Add a CI workflow running the same local preflight checks testers run; currently blocked by foreman/disallowed policy on .github/workflows mutations.

title: Local-check integration test portability
description: Make local-check spawnSync integration tests portable and bounded: add timeouts, replace sep string interpolation with path.join.

title: CLI smoke test stability
description: Tighten cli-smoke-local-page and status-failed-frames tests: await server.close(), document TIMELAPSE_SIMULATE_FRAME_FAILURE semantics.

title: Normalize doctor check output shape
description: Make doctor checks produce consistent shapes: validate name/status/message in normalizeCheckResult and normalize undefined error/fix to null.

title: Doctor source health (no merge markers)
description: Eliminate merge conflict markers in src/doctor.mjs and keep the module syntactically clean so tests can load it.

title: Fake-ffmpeg test harness fixes
description: Tighten the fake-ffmpeg test double: correct fix-version handling in success mode and matching --keep-all cleanup coverage.

title: Cleanup refusal messaging & error routing
description: Surface validateMP4/validation.error reasons in cleanup refusal output and route RENDER_DEPENDENCY_MISSING via error codes, not string prefix matching.

title: Run-scoped output paths & metadata
description: Make renderFrames respect configured/custom output paths (no false OUTPUT_PATH_MISMATCH) and write complete renderMetadata to run-summary.json.

title: Render readiness: dependency + MP4 validation
description: Block render/cleanup unless ffmpeg+ffprobe are present and the rendered MP4 passes size/duration/stream validation; preserve frames on any failure.

title: Test Suite & Local Preflight
description: Stabilize npm test and local-check: deterministic CLI smoke tests, portable local-check integration tests, and a preflight workflow matching what testers will run.

title: Doctor Command & Diagnostics
description: Ship a 'doctor' command reporting Node/Playwright/Chromium/ffmpeg/ffprobe readiness with normalized human + JSON output, and keep src/doctor.mjs healthy (no merge markers, predictable check shapes).

title: Render & Cleanup Safety
description: Make render and frame cleanup safe for dogfood: dependency validation (ffmpeg/ffprobe), MP4 validation before cleanup, run-scoped output path handling, and clear render metadata + cleanup refusal messaging.
